title: In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section 3 of Section 4 of the Coir Industry Act 1953 45 of 1953 read with rules 4 and 5 of the Coir Industry Rules
description: In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section 3 of Section 4 of the Coir Industry Act 1953 45 of 1953 read with rules 4 and 5 of the Coir Industry Rules

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2539] ubZ fnYyh] lkseokj] vDrwcj 24] 2016@dk£rd 2] 1938 No. 2539] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, OCTOBER 24, 2016/KARTIKA 2, 1938 सू᭯ म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒ म मंᮢ ालय अिधसूचना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 24 अᲦूबर, 2016 का.आ. 3284(अ).—कयर उ᳒ोग िनयमावली, 1954 के िनयम 4 और 5 के साथ पᳯठत क यर उ᳒ोग अिधिनयम, 1953 (1953 का 45) कᳱ धारा 4 कᳱ उपधारा (3) ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, के᭠ᮤ सरकार ᳇ारा डॉ. िवनय पी. सह᮲बु᳍े , संसद सद᭭य, रा᭔य सभा को कयर बोडᭅ का सद᭭य सरकारी गजट मᱶ इस अिधसूचना के ᮧकाशन कᳱ ितिथ से 29 िसत᭥बर, 2018 तक कᳱ अविध के िलए िनयुᲦ ᳰकया जाता है और इस उ᳎े᭫य के िलए सू᭯म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒म मंᮢालय, भारत सरकार कᳱ ᳰदनांक 30 िसत᭥ब र, 2015 कᳱ अिधसूचना सं का.आ 2677(अ) मᱶ िन᳜िलिखत संशोधन कर ती है, नामतः- 2. उᲦ अिधसूचना मᱶ शीषᭅ “᮰ेणी-(ई)” के अंतगᭅत ᮓम सं᭎या 2 तथा उससे संबंिधत ᮧिवि᳥ के बाद िन᳜िलिखत ᮓम सं. और ᮧिवि᳥ को जोड़ा जाएगा, नामतः- ᮓ.सं. नाम और पता “3. डॉ. िवनय पी. सह᮲बु᳍े, संसद सद᭭य, रा᭔य सभा महारा᳦ सदन, कॉपरिनकस मागᭅ, नई ᳰद᭨ली-110001.” [फा.सं.6(2)/2014-कयर] बी.एच. अिनल कुमार, संयुᲦ सिचव ᳯट᭡पण:- मूल अिधसूचना ᳰदनांक 30 िसत᭥बर, 2015 कᳱ सं का.आ 2677(अ) के तहत भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग- II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th October, 2016 S.O. 3284(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 4 of the Coir Industry Act, 1953 (45 of 1953), read with rules 4 and 5 of the Coir Industry Rules, 1954, the Central Government hereby appoints Dr. Vinay P. Sahasrabuddhe, Member of Parliament, Rajya Sabha to be a Member of the Coir Board for a period upto 29th September,2018, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the official gazette and for the said purpose, makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprise, number S.O. 2677(E) dated the 30th September, 2015, namely:— 2. In the said notification, under the heading “Category-(e)”, after serial number 2 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be inserted, namely:— Sl.No. Name and address “3. Dr. Vinay P. Sahasrabuddhe, Member, Rajya Sabha, Maharashtra Sadan, Copernicus Marg, New Delhi-110001.” [F.No.6(2)/2014-Coir] B.H. ANIL KUMAR, Jt.Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 2677(E), dated the 30th September, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
